name: chr19_centromere
description: Chromosome 19 centromere and pericentric SD field. The chr19 centromere is small (~2 Mb of alpha-satellite, D19Z3 array) but surrounded by extraordinarily SD-dense pericentric KRAB-ZNF and pseudogene blocks; one of the most challenging regions in GRCh38, fully resolved only in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: Core D19Z3 alpha-satellite higher-order repeat array (~2 Mb) with ~171 bp monomers and complex higher-order organization; pericentric SDs of 50-300 kb at >99% identity carry KRAB-ZNF paralogs; centromere position drifts in CHM13.
